title: Build silently skips replacement of undefined build args in `LABEL` values
body:
### Issue Description

Build silently skips replacement of undefined build args in `LABEL` values. 

(Please move to Buildah project if appropriate.)

### Steps to reproduce the issue

1. 
    ```Containerfile
    FROM scratch
    LABEL \
      org.opencontainers.image.revision="{REVISION:?}"
   ```
2. `podman build`



### Describe the results you received

`podman inspect --type=image`

```
 "Labels": {
               "org.opencontainers.image.revision": "{REVISION:?}",
```

whereas other labels containing build args have them properly substituted, with and without `:?`.

### Describe the results you expected

All labels containing build args have them properly substituted with the same semantics as elsewhere in the Containerfile: with `:?`: exception when empty/unset (but see containers/buildah#5234), empty string without.

comments.body:
You forgot the dollar sign to make it a variable, this works:
`org.opencontainers.image.revision="${REVISION:?}"`
Haha, hidden in plain sight I suppose 😝.
